---
title: "Hello World!"
description: "Welcome to WISSPAR — a visualization and data curation tool for pneumococcal vaccine immunogenicity data."
author: "The WISSPAR Team"
date: "2022-06-22"
categories: [updates]
image: images/logo-new.png
---

Welcome to **WISSPAR**, the Worldwide Index of Serotype Specific Antibody
Responses.

WISSPAR is a visualization and data curation tool to help you compile and
organize immunogenicity data from clinical trials of pneumococcal vaccines. The
platform sources its information primarily from the outcome tables available on
[clinicaltrials.gov](https://clinicaltrials.gov){target="_blank"} and presents
this data in a searchable, customizable format that you can visualize and export
for further research.

WISSPAR is a collaborative effort between the
[Yale School of Public Health](https://ysph.yale.edu){target="_blank"} and the
[Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health](https://publichealth.jhu.edu){target="_blank"},
supported by the [Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation](https://www.gatesfoundation.org){target="_blank"}.
Our goal is to support the research community by enabling comparisons and
meta-analyses across different vaccine products, dosing schedules, and measured
outcomes.
